message:
✨ Show all Torrentio sources, resolve on-demand via debrid (#26)

- Restructured resolveStreams to return ALL torrent sources (not just cached)
- Cached sources marked with ⚡ and sorted first
- Stream picker now scrollable with drag handle, shows seed count
- On-demand resolution: user picks a source, then magnet is resolved via debrid
- Works for both cached (instant) and non-cached (add+wait) torrents
- Added resolveMagnet() method to ShowsRepository

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
